headline: RGA Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates on Higher Investment Income
summary: Reinsurance Group tops Q1 estimates as Financial Solutions growth, higher investment income, and premium gains lift earnings and revenues.

raw.headline: RGA Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates on Higher Investment Income
raw.summary: Reinsurance Group tops Q1 estimates as Financial Solutions growth, higher investment income, and premium gains lift earnings and revenues.

headline: What Everest Group (EG)'s Profit Surge and Aggressive Buybacks Mean For Shareholders
summary: In the past quarter ended March 31, 2026, Everest Group, Ltd. reported revenue of US$4,068 million versus US$4,263 million a year earlier, while net income rose to US$653 million and basic and diluted earnings per share from continuing operations increased to US$16.21 from US$4.90. Alongside stronger profitability, Everest continued reshaping its business and capital structure by repurchasing 1,002,516 shares for US$331 million during the quarter, bringing total buybacks under its...
